name: spoo · redis
description: Redis health, memory, hit rate, ops, slow log. Refresh 60s. Metrics via vector + redis_exporter.

query.apl:
['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_keyspace_hits_total' or name == 'redis_keyspace_misses_total'
| summarize
    hits = sumif(['counter.value'], name == 'redis_keyspace_hits_total'),
    misses = sumif(['counter.value'], name == 'redis_keyspace_misses_total')
| extend hit_rate = round(iff((hits + misses) > 0, 100.0 * hits / (hits + misses), 0.0), 2)
| project hit_rate

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_memory_used_bytes'
| summarize bytes = max(['gauge.value'])
| extend mb = round(bytes / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 1)
| project mb

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_db_keys'
| summarize total = max(['gauge.value'])
| project total

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_connected_clients'
| summarize clients = max(['gauge.value'])
| project clients

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_evicted_keys_total'
| summarize evicted = max(['counter.value'])
| project evicted

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_uptime_in_seconds'
| summarize secs = max(['gauge.value'])
| extend hours = round(secs / 3600.0, 1)
| project hours

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_keyspace_hits_total' or name == 'redis_keyspace_misses_total'
| summarize value = max(['counter.value']) by bin_auto(_time), name

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_keyspace_hits_total' or name == 'redis_keyspace_misses_total'
| summarize
    hits = sumif(['counter.value'], name == 'redis_keyspace_hits_total'),
    misses = sumif(['counter.value'], name == 'redis_keyspace_misses_total')
  by bin_auto(_time)
| extend hit_rate = round(iff((hits + misses) > 0, 100.0 * hits / (hits + misses), 0.0), 2)
| project _time, hit_rate

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_memory_used_bytes'
| summarize mb = max(['gauge.value']) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_commands_processed_total'
| summarize cmds = max(['counter.value']) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_db_keys'
| summarize keys = max(['gauge.value']) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_connected_clients'
| summarize clients = max(['gauge.value']) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_evicted_keys_total'
| summarize evicted = max(['counter.value']) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_net_input_bytes_total' or name == 'redis_net_output_bytes_total'
| summarize bytes = max(['counter.value']) by bin_auto(_time), name

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_cpu_user_seconds_total' or name == 'redis_cpu_sys_seconds_total'
| summarize cpu = max(['counter.value']) by bin_auto(_time), name

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio'
| summarize ratio = max(['gauge.value']) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_commands_total' and isnotnull(['tags.cmd'])
| summarize calls = max(['counter.value']) by tostring(['tags.cmd'])
| top 20 by calls

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_commands_latencies_usec' and isnotnull(['tags.cmd'])
| summarize
    sum = max(['aggregated_summary.sum']),
    count = max(['aggregated_summary.count'])
  by tostring(['tags.cmd'])
| extend avg_us = iff(count > 0, sum / count, 0.0)
| project cmd = tags_cmd, avg_us, count
| top 20 by avg_us

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_slowlog_length'
| summarize len = max(['gauge.value'])
| project len

['spoo-metrics']
| where name == 'redis_blocked_clients'
| summarize blocked = max(['gauge.value'])
| project blocked
